name: Architecture Cosmos Tool Registry

tools.label: Brain Autopilot
tools.purpose: Select the next safe Brain task and run only local review pipelines such as rights-gate, enrichment review, model planning, media audit or entry-build review.

tools.label: Brain Guarded Autopush
tools.purpose: After explicit owner approval, run security, lint and build gates, commit safe tracked repository changes and push main to production.

tools.label: Brain Promotion Controller
tools.purpose: Plan or execute owner-approved batch promotion from local reviewed proposed-entry.json packs into data/mock-entries.json, without asset uploads or D1/R2 writes.

tools.label: Brain Entry Pipeline
tools.purpose: Run the full local review chain for one entry: research seed, enrichment review, rights gate, 2D plan review, 3D model review, architecture text review, model status and archive validation.

tools.label: Kosmo Project Package Check
tools.purpose: Validate a local Kosmo project package manifest, required module folders, JSON files, JSONL logs and review-gate structure before Kosmo Design, Draw, Viz or Publish consume the package.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Library Check
tools.purpose: Validate a local review-only KosmoAsset library manifest, rights status, public-use gates, local files and planned Blender/ArchiCAD/Web export targets before any asset is exposed or uploaded.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Export Plan
tools.purpose: Create a local review-only export readiness plan for KosmoAsset routes such as Blender, ArchiCAD, Web, SVG, DXF and GLB without generating files, uploading assets or opening public downloads.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Exchange Profile
tools.purpose: Create a local review-only Blender, ArchiCAD and Web exchange profile from asset metadata, review-pack gates and export routes without importing, uploading or publishing assets.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Handoff Bundle
tools.purpose: Generate a review-only Blender Python handoff and ArchiCAD schedule CSV from the KosmoAsset exchange profile without importing, writing project files, uploading or publishing assets.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Handoff Smoke
tools.purpose: Verify the review-only Blender Python handoff and ArchiCAD schedule CSV without importing assets, writing project files, uploading or publishing anything.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Review Pack
tools.purpose: Assemble local asset library checks, export routes, generated profiles and human-review checklist rows into one review-only KosmoAsset pack without promoting, uploading or publishing assets.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Demo GLB Generator
tools.purpose: Generate a local review-only analytic GLB asset for Blender/Web/ArchiCAD exchange tests without R2 upload, D1 write or public download exposure.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Demo DXF Generator
tools.purpose: Generate local review-only DXF plan symbols and component footprints for ArchiCAD/CAD exchange tests without R2 upload, D1 write or public download exposure.

tools.label: KosmoAsset Demo Material Profile Generator
tools.purpose: Generate a local review-only procedural material profile for Blender and ArchiCAD material mapping without R2 upload, D1 write or public download exposure.

tools.label: Kosmo Project Package Create
tools.purpose: Create a new local review-only Kosmo project package with manifest, brief, constraints, source registry, model profile, context candidate and selection scaffolds, placeholder plan exports, viz presets, publish scaffold and memory logs.

tools.label: Kosmo Prepare Package Import
tools.purpose: Import a local KosmosPrepare Phase 0 output folder into a review-only Kosmo project package with source registry, constraints, design seed, context candidate and selection scaffolds, placeholders and memory logs.

tools.label: Kosmo Project Package Review
tools.purpose: Assemble a local Kosmo Publish review pack from the project manifest, module states, review gates, inputs, outputs, context selection status and memory logs.

tools.label: Kosmo Blender Package Bridge Smoke
tools.purpose: Run a local headless Blender smoke test that imports a Kosmo project package through the KosmoDraw/KosmoDesign package bridge, verifies Prepare context reports with DXF/IFC heuristics, generated context candidates, generated room objects, model-profile write-back, Kosmo Draw SVG exports and Kosmo Viz PNG previews.

tools.label: Kosmo Context Selection
tools.purpose: Create, refresh or explicitly decide a human-reviewable context selection from generated Prepare/DXF/IFC context candidates before any candidate can become a design seed. Supports --decision candidate=accepted_as_context|accepted_as_design_seed|needs_more_source_review|rejected and final --approve-design-generation.

tools.label: Kosmo Context Decision Matrix
tools.purpose: Generate an advisory decision matrix that recommends context-only, design-seed, more source review or rejected handling for context candidates without changing human selection approvals.

tools.label: Kosmo Context Review
tools.purpose: Create a compact owner-facing context review that combines candidates, selection state and the advisory matrix into concrete review commands before KosmoDraw uses any context as design input.

tools.label: Kosmo Context Source Map
tools.purpose: Inventory local DXF layers and IFC entity types with advisory Kosmo roles so source review can turn raw files into explicit mapping decisions without approving design generation.

tools.label: Kosmo Context Source Review
tools.purpose: Inspect local DXF/IFC source files for candidates marked needs_more_source_review and write an evidence report with open human checks before any design-seed approval.

tools.label: Kosmo Context Source Mapping
tools.purpose: Create or update the human DXF layer and semantic IFC mapping gate after source-map/source-review, including explicit per-source decisions before syncing anything back to context-selection.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Semantic Proof
tools.purpose: Run a read-only semantic IFC proof for IFCBUILDINGELEMENTPROXY elements, spatial containment and property-set links before any IFC candidate can become a design seed.

tools.label: Kosmo IfcOpenShell Review
tools.purpose: Open the IFC through IfcOpenShell and verify schema, units, project hierarchy, storeys, element classes, placements, representations and property sets without generating design geometry.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Geometry Preview
tools.purpose: Create a read-only faceted BREP geometry preview and SVG top projection for IFCBUILDINGELEMENTPROXY elements before any semantic IFC design-seed approval.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC/DXF Alignment Preview
tools.purpose: Overlay accepted DXF context polylines with IFC geometry bounding boxes to review origin, scale and extent before any semantic IFC design-seed approval.

tools.label: Kosmo Design Context Handoff
tools.purpose: Compile reviewed context, blocked source-review inputs and design-generation guardrails into a context-only handoff for Kosmo Design.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Layer Plan
tools.purpose: Translate reviewed IFC semantic and geometry evidence into review-only Blender collections, ArchiCAD layers and material/structure layer groups before any model export.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Human Review Pack
tools.purpose: Gather IFC semantic proof, geometry preview, DXF alignment, layer plan and Blender audit into a human checklist before any IFC design-seed approval.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Review Viewer
tools.purpose: Create a static local HTML dashboard for IFC machine evidence, preview SVGs, semantic distributions and the human decision checklist without approving design generation.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Human Review Decision
tools.purpose: Create or record the explicit human IFC decision gate after the static review viewer. Draft mode does not approve anything; final context or design-seed decisions require reviewer flags.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Human Review Sync
tools.purpose: Create a dry-run sync plan from a final IFC human decision into context-selection and source-mapping; applying the plan requires explicit mutation confirmation flags.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Human Review Guide
tools.purpose: Generate a project-specific human IFC review Anleitung with viewer links, Bonsai/IfcOpenShell review steps, red flags, decision rubric and final decision commands.

tools.label: Kosmo IFC Human Review Session
tools.purpose: Create or update an editable human IFC review session log with per-check statuses, reviewer notes, proposed decision and next commands before recording a final decision.

tools.label: Kosmo Model Layer Handoff
tools.purpose: Compile IFC layer plan output into dry-run Blender collection scripts, ArchiCAD layer schedules and future GLB export paths while keeping model export blocked until human approval.

tools.label: Kosmo Blender Context Import
tools.purpose: Generate a read-only Blender Python context script that creates locked origin, perimeter, DXF underlay, IFC bounds and layer-review collections without enabling design generation.

tools.label: Kosmo Blender Context Smoke
tools.purpose: Run the generated read-only Blender context import script headlessly, save an optional review blend file and verify locked context objects without generating design geometry.

tools.label: Kosmo Blender Context Audit
tools.purpose: Reopen the saved Blender context blend and compare objects, locks, review-only tags, DXF/IFC counts and layer collections against the generated import plan.

tools.label: Kosmo Context Guard
tools.purpose: Verify that context candidates are not used as downstream design seeds unless context-selection has explicit accepted_as_design_seed decisions and approved_for_design_generation is true.

tools.label: Brain Text Polish
tools.purpose: Turn Brain-reviewed entry metadata, analysis layers and source trails into better German public contribution texts without new browsing or private asset use.

tools.label: Brain Model Status
tools.purpose: Audit which entries have public GLB previews, local review GLBs, planned-only model targets or no model plan.

tools.label: Brain Model Batch
tools.purpose: Run local model planning and reviewed procedural generation for pilot entries without uploading assets or writing public data.

tools.label: Brain Model Review
tools.purpose: Parse local review GLBs, inspect node/material/layer coverage and recommend whether a model is ready for owner promotion review.

tools.label: Brain Model Promote
tools.purpose: After owner approval, validate a local review GLB, copy its low-poly preview into public/archive-models and register it in the public model manifest.

tools.label: 2D Vector Plan Generator
tools.purpose: Generate rights-safe Cosmos-style SVG/DXF study plans, sections and vector plan graphs.

tools.label: 3D Model Generator
tools.purpose: Prepare Blender/ArchiCAD model packages and generate diagrammatic GLB models where a reviewed template exists.

tools.label: Architecture Text Generator
tools.purpose: Rewrite dry archive data and source notes into precise architectural headliners, overview text and question-led prose around These, Netzwerk/DNA, Topos, Typos, Tektonik, Kritik and KosmoData/3D value.

tools.label: Entry Build Review
tools.purpose: Run the local plan, model and text tools together and produce a single review packet for owner approval.

tools.label: KosmoData Enrichment Review
tools.purpose: Convert source-backed enrichment seeds into a proposed Entry update, rights report and promotion review without writing public data.

tools.label: KosmoData Seed From Research
tools.purpose: Generate a review-only enrichment seed candidate from existing entry metadata and database research packs, including plan, 3D and viewer requirements.

tools.label: KosmoData Promote Reviewed Entry
tools.purpose: After owner review, promote a generated proposed-entry.json into data/mock-entries.json. This still does not upload assets or write D1/R2.

tools.label: Book Library Ingest
tools.purpose: Classify private book scans, book PDFs and photographed pages into local review packs with detected project drafts and strict rights separation.

tools.label: Book Entry Drafts
tools.purpose: Convert detected private book projects into public-safe metadata-only Entry draft candidates for manual review.

tools.label: Book Pipeline Review
tools.purpose: Run book ingest, detected project draft generation and draft validation as one local review-only pipeline.

tools.label: Database Research Agents
tools.purpose: Prepare historical and contemporary source packs from the curated registry without writing to the public database.

tools.label: Source Registry Audit
tools.purpose: Check source coverage, rights modes, automation readiness and unsafe URLs before Brain research runs.

guardrails: Generated drawings and models are diagrammatic study reconstructions unless verified otherwise.
Do not publish exact plan-derived assets from unclear or copyrighted sources.
Book scans, OCR text and photographed pages stay private unless rights are explicitly cleared.
Do not upload, commit or write to D1/R2 from these tools.
Every generated artifact must include source_basis, review_status and public_use_allowed metadata.
